privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model, while the structural layout specifications (front spar at 0.22 chord, rear spar at 0.68 chord, and 34 spanwise ribs) are synthetically generated for the scenario via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected output path '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_structural.vsp3' and all structural constraints exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and verifier.py logic.
